ham.subject: Updated Company Leave Policy – Effective Immediately
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope you are all doing well. As part of our ongoing effort to streamline employee benefits, we have made several updates to the company leave policy. These changes will take effect immediately and include:
• Revised annual leave accrual rates.
• Expanded eligibility for remote work leaves.
• Updated procedures for submitting leave requests.

Please review the full policy document attached and familiarize yourself with the new guidelines.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to the HR department.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Jane Doe
HR Manager

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is an urgent notice from the Finance & HR Department. Our payroll system has detected a discrepancy in your salary calculation for the current month. To avoid any delay in your payment, please verify your personal and banking details by clicking the link below within the next 24 hours.

<URL>

Failure to comply may result in withholding of your salary.

Regards,
Finance Team
